About

Better Transseptal for All.

ElectroWire Medical was founded to provide “Better Transseptal for All,” improving inter‑atrial septal puncture and transseptal device delivery for the benefit of patients and the people taking care of them.

Our Story

Engineered in Lexington, South Carolina.

Early device development was completed in Temecula, California, and manufacturing operations and headquarters are now established in Lexington, South Carolina. Our first system, the LightningWire™ Transseptal Puncture System, is FDA 510(k) cleared and used in minimally invasive catheter ablation, left atrial appendage occlusion, and transcatheter mitral valve procedures.

Headquarters
Lexington, South Carolina
Origin
Temecula, California
Regulatory status
FDA 510(k) cleared
Our Facility

Made in Lexington, SC.

LightningWire is engineered and manufactured at our headquarters and cleanroom manufacturing facility in Lexington, South Carolina.
